_comment: Template opencode configuration for Scholar Dev Hub. Copy to your repo as `opencode.json` and edit the [BRACKETED] values. Docs: https://opencode.ai/docs/config
_comment2: opencode reads this on every session and uses it to pick the model, route to providers, and apply permission rules for tools like bash, file edits, and web fetches.

[REPLACE: agent-name, e.g. reviewer].description: A focused code reviewer that only comments, never edits.
[REPLACE: agent-name, e.g. reviewer].prompt: You are a senior code reviewer. Skim the diff, report risks, and propose minimal fixes. Never edit files yourself.

small_model._comment: Used for lightweight tasks (summaries, file renames). Cheaper + faster.
